nasb.text: When those riches were lost through a bad investment and he had fathered a son, then there was nothing to support him.

esv.text: and those riches were lost in a bad venture. And he is father of a son, but he has nothing in his hand.

cnv.text: 遭遇禍患，財富就盡失；他即使生了兒子，也沒有甚麼留給他。

ccb.text: 经营不善，便财富尽失，什么也不能留给儿子。

csbs.text: 那财富也在悲苦的事中消亡了；所以当他生儿子的时候，自己的手中却一无所有。
